scripts.build: cd ../.. && pnpm turbo run build:web --filter=@zapengine/app && rm -rf apps/frontend/dist && mkdir -p apps/frontend/dist && cp -R apps/app/dist/web apps/frontend/dist/web
scripts.type-check: echo 'frontend shim has no TypeScript sources'
scripts.lint: echo 'frontend shim has no source lint target'
scripts.test:ci: echo 'frontend shim has no CI tests'
scripts.test:coverage: echo 'frontend shim has no coverage target'
scripts.test:unit: echo 'frontend shim has no unit tests'
scripts.test:watch: echo 'frontend shim has no watch tests'
scripts.deadcode: echo 'frontend shim has no source deadcode target'
scripts.dup:check: echo 'frontend shim has no source duplication target'
